scenario.name: Bob Ross
scenario.brief: PRACTICE (won't count) · EASY. An easy-going traveller after a happy, sunny week somewhere beachy — a gentle warm-up.

buyer.text: Well, hello there, friend! I'm thinking it's time to paint myself a little happy scene — a week somewhere warm and sunny, right by the beach. Something peaceful and easy, you know? Just the kind of place where every day feels like a perfect little landscape waiting to happen.
